name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #13
description: Florentine Brainrot #13 is a glitch candy rot single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Webring Validator Shrine. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Sette di Coppe, used here as the witness card. A witness line runs from a Solomonic seal copied in Florentine margin hand to a side-quest tracker for sacred receipts without pretending it is holy. The groupchat says no cap and immediately screenshots the evidence. Serial BOTT-13 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks RATIO at Σ 378.

attributes.value: a pixelated espresso cup that steams private keys
